title: lupinus littoralis var. variicolor
intro: Lupinus littoralis var. variicolor, also known as the variable lupine, is a variety of the coastal lupine plant, which is a flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lupinus littoralis var. variicolor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Lupinus littoralis var. variicolor is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
